How Gharpayy works

01

Search & Discover

Browse verified PGs by area, budget, and preferences. Every listing is real and up-to-date.

02

Tour & Compare

Schedule visits or take virtual tours. Compare rooms, amenities, and prices side by side.

03

Book Instantly

Reserve your bed with just ₹1,000. Zero brokerage, transparent pricing, instant confirmation.
